business_entity_type: 合同会社 (GK) / 株式会社 (KK)
tax_note: Consumption tax 10%; corporate tax ~23%; simplified filing for small businesses

vat_gst.name: Consumption Tax (消費税)
vat_gst.registration_threshold: ¥10,000,000 taxable sales in base period (two fiscal years prior)
vat_gst.registration_threshold_note: Businesses with taxable sales under ¥10M in the base period are exempt. New businesses are exempt for first two fiscal years (with exceptions for large-capital companies). Invoice system (Tekikaku Invoice) mandatory for tax-registered businesses since October 2023.
vat_gst.digital_products: Digital services provided by non-resident businesses to Japanese consumers are subject to 10% consumption tax. Non-resident sellers of digital services must register if they have a PE in Japan or qualify under the reverse charge mechanism for B2B.

digital_product_tax: Digital products are subject to 10% consumption tax. The 2015 reform extended consumption tax to digital services from overseas providers. For B2C digital services, the overseas provider must register and collect tax. For B2B, the reverse charge mechanism applies.

entity_comparison.type: Kojin Jigyo (個人事業 / Sole Proprietorship)
entity_comparison.annual_cost: Minimal (blue return application recommended for tax benefits)
entity_comparison.tax_treatment: Progressive income tax 5-45% + residence tax ~10%. Blue return filers get ¥650,000 special deduction.
entity_comparison.best_for: Starting out; freelancers; revenue under ¥8M; simplest option

entity_comparison.type: GK (合同会社 / Godo Kaisha — similar to LLC)
entity_comparison.tax_treatment: Corporate tax ~23% effective (national + local). Director compensation is a deductible expense.
entity_comparison.best_for: Small businesses wanting liability protection at lower cost than KK; no minimum capital

entity_comparison.type: KK (株式会社 / Kabushiki Kaisha — Corporation)
entity_comparison.tax_treatment: Same as GK. More prestige and flexibility for equity investors.
entity_comparison.best_for: Seeking external investment; enterprise clients; highest credibility structure

isp_note: NTT/KDDI fiber widely available; 1Gbps standard in urban areas
